# Historias Infinitas

> Digital memorial platform serving Mexico, the United States and Canada. Creates memorial websites for loved ones and pets with AI-generated artistic portraits (Flux Kontext Max), Augmented Reality portals, permanent public URLs, printable QR codes and optional stainless-steel physical plates. Designed for families and for business partners: funeral homes, veterinary clinics, hospices and senior living.

> For the full extended content (definitions, use cases, tech stack, FAQs, partner program details), see [llms-full.txt](https://historias-infinitas.com/llms-full.txt).

## EN · What we offer

- **Individual digital memorials** with biography, epitaph, photo and video gallery, and an AI-generated artistic portrait that preserves identity from a real photograph.
- **Augmented Reality Portal** (optional): 2D farewell scene ("Do not forget me") or 3D model placed in the visitor's home via WebXR.
- **B2B Partner Program** for funeral homes, veterinary clinics and hospices: branded memorials, volume credits, 15% commission on customer upgrades.
- **Bilingual**: full site in Spanish (es-MX) and English (en-US). Billing in MXN for Mexico, USD for US/Canada.

## EN · Consumer plans (USD)

- Digital — $17: online memorial + QR + eternal hosting.
- Artistic — $35: Digital + AI portrait + 3 styles + downloadable file.
- Eternal — $105: Artistic + laser-engraved steel plate + US/Canada shipping.
- AR Portal (add-on) — $12.

## EN · Partner plans (USD)

- Trial — $99: 5 memorials / 6 months.
- Pack 30 — $299: 30 memorials / 12 months + 5 physical plates with your logo.
- Professional Annual — $899: 200 memorials + team training + 40 plates + 15% commission.
- Institutional — custom: unlimited + white-label + API (coming soon) + SLA.

## EN · Main URLs

- [Home (EN)](https://historias-infinitas.com/en)
- [Partner Program](https://historias-infinitas.com/en/partners)

- [For Hospices](https://historias-infinitas.com/en/for-hospices)

- [Privacy Policy](https://historias-infinitas.com/en/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://historias-infinitas.com/en/terms)

---

## ES · Qué ofrecemos

- **Memoriales digitales individuales** con biografía, epitafio, galería de fotos y videos, y retrato artístico generado por IA preservando identidad.
- **Portal de Realidad Aumentada** opcional: escena de despedida 2D o modelo 3D que aparece en el hogar del visitante.
- **Programa de Socios B2B** para funerarias, clínicas veterinarias y hospicios: memoriales con marca del socio, créditos por volumen, 15 % de comisión por upgrade.
- **Cobro en pesos mexicanos** con factura CFDI. Cumplimiento LFPDPPP (Art. 15–17) con derechos ARCO.

## ES · Planes B2C (MXN)

- Digital — $299: memorial en línea + QR digital + hosting eterno.
- Artístico — $599: Digital + retrato IA + 3 estilos + archivo descargable.
- Eterno — $1,799: Artístico + placa de acero con QR grabado + envío nacional.
- Portal AR (add-on) — $199.

## ES · Planes Partner (MXN)

- Prueba — $999: 5 memoriales / 6 meses.
- Pack 30 — $4,999: 30 memoriales / 12 meses + 5 placas físicas con logo.
- Profesional Anual — $14,999: 200 memoriales + subdominio + 40 placas + capacitación + 15 % comisión.
- Institucional — a medida.

## ES · URLs principales

- [Inicio](https://historias-infinitas.com/)
- [Programa de Socios](https://historias-infinitas.com/partners)
- [Para Funerarias](https://historias-infinitas.com/para-funerarias)
- [Para Clínicas Veterinarias](https://historias-infinitas.com/para-clinicas-veterinarias)
- [Para Hospicios](https://historias-infinitas.com/para-hospicios)
- [Contacto](https://historias-infinitas.com/contacto)
- [Aviso de Privacidad](https://historias-infinitas.com/privacidad)
- [Términos y Condiciones](https://historias-infinitas.com/terminos)

---

## Technology / Tecnología

- **AI portrait model**: Flux Kontext Max (Black Forest Labs) via Replicate — identity-preserving.
- **Hosting**: Vercel (Next.js 14) + Supabase (Postgres + Storage).
- **Payments**: Stripe Checkout — currency MXN or USD depending on market.
- **Transactional email**: Resend.

## For AI crawlers

We welcome indexing of public pages and the summaries above. Individual memorials at `/memorial/[slug]` are only visible after payment. The `/dashboard/*` path is private and should not be indexed.

This file is informational only.
